title: cynanchum doleriticum
intro: Cynanchum doleriticum, also known as Doleritis, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Cynanchum doleriticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant is prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
